GenAiPromptTemplate.description: Generates a GNG Score card based on data from GPS project and related objects

templateVersions.content:
Use the following data from GPS Project - GPS Project Created Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.CreatedDate} - GPS Project Number: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Name} - Region: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Region__c} - GPS Project Target Date: - GPS Project Due Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.DueDate__c} - Org 62 Account Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Account_Name__c} - Org 62 Oppty Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Opp_Name__c} - AE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_Sales_Rationale__c} - AE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - Security Specialist Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_Sec_Specialist_Sales_Rationale__c} - GNG Score: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GNG_Score__c} In addition, use the following data related to the GPS project object for further analysis: Dataset 1: {!$RelatedList:GPS_Project__c.GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__r.Records} Dataset 2: {!$Flow:Prompt_Template_Get_Answer_Bank.Prompt} """Instructions: Summarize the insights from the data based on the following instructions 1.Significant Point Losses (no tables) Consider Dataset 1 only. Include all roles (AE, SE, AE MGR, SE MGR, Security, etc.). Display all records where Score__c ≤ -20 from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c. For each record, render the details as plain text blocks: Question: {{Question__c}}
Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
Score: {{Score__c}}
Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
- Title this section as **"Significant Point Losses"**. - Add a sub-section: Direct or Indirect: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Direct_or_Indirect__c} - From **Dataset 2**, also include this question (with its answer, score, and comments): “Do you have a confirmed partner that is responding to the RFx/Tender, and does the partner have an existing relationship with the customer (e.g., System Integrator)?” 2. Other Significant Questions (no tables) Step 1: Group all records in Dataset 2 (answer bank) by RFP Pursuit Question Bank. Step 2: Keep only groups that have answer values of 0 and 10. Step 3: Filter to only include questions where RFP_Sales_Role__c = "Account Executive". Step 4: Use those question IDs to find the related data from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c (Dataset 1). Step 5: Keep only questions where the answer resolves to 0 points. Step 6: Exclude the question “Have you zipped and uploaded ALL RFx documents and attachments as part of this RFx intake request?”. Step 7: Render each record as plain text blocks (no table): Question: {{Question__c}}
Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
Score: {{Score__c}}
Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
Step 8: Add this question (with its answer, score, and comments): “If the solution requires integration to be compliant, does the customer currently have Mulesoft or another API tool?” - Title this section as **"Other Significant Questions"**. 3. Answer Summary Provide a concise summary of the entire GNG scorecard and the answers (no more than 4 sentences). 4. Rationale Summary Summarize the AE, AE MGR, SE MGR, and Security Specialist rationales collectively (do not separate by role). Finally, provide a recommendation on whether to move forward with this opportunity based on all of the data. Do not add any details other than the ones specified above. Generate the result as HTML suitable for display in a Salesforce Rich Text Area. Do not add “html” at the top or “” at the bottom. """

Use the following data from GPS Project - GPS Project Created Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.CreatedDate} - GPS Project Number: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Name} - Region: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Region__c} - GPS Project Target Date: - GPS Project Due Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.DueDate__c} - Org 62 Account Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Account_Name__c} - Org 62 Oppty Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Opp_Name__c} - AE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_Sales_Rationale__c} - AE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - Security Specialist Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_Sec_Specialist_Sales_Rationale__c} - GNG Score: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GNG_Score__c} In addition, use the following data related to the GPS project object for further analysis: Dataset 1: {!$RelatedList:GPS_Project__c.GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__r.Records} Dataset 2: {!$Flow:Prompt_Template_Get_Answer_Bank.Prompt} """Instructions: Summarize the insights from the data based on the following instructions 1.Significant Point Losses (no tables) Consider Dataset 1 only. Include all roles (AE, SE, AE MGR, SE MGR, Security, etc.). Display all records where Score__c ≤ -20 from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c. For each record, render the details as plain text blocks: Question: {{Question__c}}
Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
Score: {{Score__c}}
Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
- Title this section as **"Significant Point Losses"**. - Add a sub-section: Direct or Indirect: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Direct_or_Indirect__c} - From **Dataset 2**, also include this question (with its answer, score, and comments): “Do you have a confirmed partner that is responding to the RFx/Tender, and does the partner have an existing relationship with the customer (e.g., System Integrator)?” 2. Other Significant Questions (no tables) Step 1: Group all records in Dataset 2 (answer bank) by RFP Pursuit Question Bank. Step 2: Keep only groups that have answer values of 0 and 10. Step 3: Filter to only include questions where RFP_Sales_Role__c = "Account Executive". Step 4: Use those question IDs to find the related data from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c (Dataset 1). Step 5: Keep only questions where the answer resolves to 0 points. Step 6: Exclude the question “Have you zipped and uploaded ALL RFx documents and attachments as part of this RFx intake request?”. Step 7: Render each record as plain text blocks (no table): Question: {{Question__c}}
Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
Score: {{Score__c}}
Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
Step 8: Add this question (with its answer, score, and comments): “If the solution requires integration to be compliant, does the customer currently have Mulesoft or another API tool?” - Title this section as **"Other Significant Questions"**. 3. Answer Summary: Provide a concise summary of the entire GNG scorecard and the answers (no more than 4 sentences). 4. Rationale Summary: Summarize the AE, AE MGR, SE MGR, and Security Specialist rationales collectively (do not separate by role). Finally, provide a recommendation on whether to move forward with this opportunity based on all of the data. Do not add any details other than the ones specified above. Generate the result as HTML suitable for display in a Salesforce Rich Text Area. Do not add “html” at the top or “” at the bottom. """

Use the following data from GPS Project - GPS Project Created Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.CreatedDate} - GPS Project Number: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Name} - Region: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Region__c} - GPS Project Target Date: - GPS Project Due Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.DueDate__c} - Org 62 Account Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Account_Name__c} - Org 62 Oppty Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Opp_Name__c} - AE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_Sales_Rationale__c} - AE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - Security Specialist Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_Sec_Specialist_Sales_Rationale__c} - GNG Score: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GNG_Score__c} In addition, use the following data related to the GPS project object for further analysis: Dataset 1: {!$RelatedList:GPS_Project__c.GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__r.Records} Dataset 2: {!$Flow:Prompt_Template_Get_Answer_Bank.Prompt} """Instructions: Summarize the insights from the data based on the following instructions 1.Significant Point Losses (no tables) Consider Dataset 1 only. Step 5: Keep only questions where the answer resolves to 0 points. Step 6: Exclude the question “Have you zipped and uploaded ALL RFx documents and attachments as part of this RFx intake request?”. Step 7: Render each record as plain text blocks (no table): Question: {{Question__c}}
Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
Score: {{Score__c}}
Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
Step 8: Add this question (with its answer, score, and comments): “If the solution requires integration to be compliant, does the customer currently have Mulesoft or another API tool?” - Title this section as **"Other Significant Questions"**. 3. Answer Summary: Provide a concise summary of the entire GNG scorecard and the answers (no more than 4 sentences). 4. Rationale Summary: Summarize the AE, AE MGR, SE MGR, and Security Specialist rationales collectively (do not separate by role). Finally, provide a recommendation on whether to move forward with this opportunity based on all of the data. Do not add any details other than the ones specified above. Generate the result as HTML suitable for display in a Salesforce Rich Text Area. Do not add “html” at the top or “” at the bottom. """

Use the following data from GPS Project - GPS Project Created Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.CreatedDate} - GPS Project Number: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Name} - Region: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Region__c} - GPS Project Target Date:  - GPS Project Due Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.DueDate__c} - Org 62 Account Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Account_Name__c} - Org 62 Oppty Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Opp_Name__c} - AE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_Sales_Rationale__c} - AE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - Security Specialist Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_Sec_Specialist_Sales_Rationale__c} - GNG Score: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GNG_Score__c} In addition, use the following data related to the GPS Project object for further analysis: Dataset 1: {!$RelatedList:GPS_Project__c.GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__r.Records} Dataset 2: {!$Flow:Prompt_Template_Get_Answer_Bank.Prompt} """Instructions: Summarize the insights from the data based on the following instructions. 1. Significant Point Losses (no tables) - Consider Dataset 1 only. - Include all roles (AE, SE, AE MGR, SE MGR, Security, etc.). - Display all records where Score__c ≤ -20 from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c. - For each record, render the details as plain text blocks:  Question: {{Question__c}}
 Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
 Score: {{Score__c}}
 Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
 
- After listing all questions, include the Direct or Indirect field and the partner question:  Direct or Indirect: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Direct_or_Indirect__c}

 From Dataset 2, also include this question (with its answer, score, and comments):  “Do you have a confirmed partner that is responding to the RFx/Tender, and does the partner have an existing relationship with the customer (e.g., System Integrator)?”  
2. Other Significant Questions (no tables) - Step 1: Group all records in Dataset 2 (answer bank) by "RFP Pursuit Question Bank". - Step 2: Keep only groups that have answer values of 0 and 10. - Step 3: Further filter to only include questions where RFP_Sales_Role__c = "Account Executive". - Step 4: Use those question IDs to find the related data from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c (Dataset 1). - Step 5: Keep only questions where the answer resolves to 0 points. - Step 6: Exclude the question “Have you zipped and uploaded ALL RFx documents and attachments as part of this RFx intake request?” - Step 7: Render each record as plain text blocks (no table):  Question: {{Question__c}}
 Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
 Score: {{Score__c}}
 Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
 
- Step 8: Add this question (with its answer, score, and comments):  “If the solution requires integration to be compliant, does the customer currently have Mulesoft or another API tool?”  
3. Answer Summary: Provide a concise summary of the entire GNG scorecard and answers (no more than 4 sentences). 4. Rationale Summary: Summarize the AE, AE MGR, SE MGR, and Security Specialist rationales collectively (do not separate by role). Finally, provide a recommendation on whether to move forward with this opportunity based on all of the data. Do not add any details other than the ones specified above. Generate the result as HTML suitable for display in a Salesforce Rich Text Area. Do not add “```html” at the top or “```” at the bottom. """

Use the following data from GPS Project - GPS Project Created Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.CreatedDate} - GPS Project Number: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Name} - Region: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Region__c} - GPS Project Target Date:  - GPS Project Due Date: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.DueDate__c} - Org 62 Account Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Account_Name__c} - Org 62 Oppty Name: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Org62_Opp_Name__c} - AE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_Sales_Rationale__c} - AE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_AE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_Sales_Rationale__c} - SE MGR Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_SE_MGR_Sales_Rationale__c} - Security Specialist Sales Rationale: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GPS_Sec_Specialist_Sales_Rationale__c} - GNG Score: {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.GNG_Score__c} In addition, use the following data related to the GPS Project object for further analysis: Dataset 1: {!$RelatedList:GPS_Project__c.GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__r.Records} Dataset 2: {!$Flow:Prompt_Template_Get_Answer_Bank.Prompt} """Instructions: Summarize the insights from the data based on the following instructions. 1. Significant Point Losses (no tables) - Consider Dataset 1 only. - Include all roles (AE, SE, AE MGR, SE MGR, Security, etc.). - Display all records where Score__c ≤ -20 from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c. - For each record, render the details as plain text blocks:  Question: {{Question__c}}
 Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
 Score: {{Score__c}}
 Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
 
- After listing all questions, include the RFx Bid Strategy (Direct or Indirect) field and the partner question:  RFx Bid Strategy (Direct or Indirect): {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Direct_or_Indirect__c}

 From Dataset 2, also include this question (with its answer, score, and comments):  “Do you have a confirmed partner that is responding to the RFx/Tender, and does the partner have an existing relationship with the customer (e.g., System Integrator)?”  
2. Other Significant Questions (no tables) - Step 1: Group all records in Dataset 2 (answer bank) by "RFP Pursuit Question Bank". - Step 2: Keep only groups that have answer values of 0 and 10. - Step 3: Further filter to only include questions where RFP_Sales_Role__c = "Account Executive". - Step 4: Use those question IDs to find the related data from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c (Dataset 1). - Step 5: Keep only questions where the answer resolves to 0 points. - Step 6: Exclude the question “Have you zipped and uploaded ALL RFx documents and attachments as part of this RFx intake request?” - Step 7: Render each record as plain text blocks (no table):  Question: {{Question__c}}
 Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
 Score: {{Score__c}}
 Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
 
- Step 8: Add this question (with its answer, score, and comments):  “If the solution requires integration to be compliant, does the customer currently have Mulesoft or another API tool?”  
3. Answer Summary: Provide a concise summary focusing primarily on insights from the Other Significant Questions section, highlighting any point losses and whether there is an active customer relationship. Limit to 4 sentences. 4. Rationale Summary: Summarize the AE, AE MGR, SE MGR, and Security Specialist rationales collectively (do not separate by role). Finally, provide a recommendation on whether to move forward with this opportunity based on all of the data. Do not add any details other than the ones specified above. Generate the result as HTML suitable for display in a Salesforce Rich Text Area. Do not add “```html” at the top or “```” at the bottom. """

 Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
 Score: {{Score__c}}
 Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
 
- After listing all questions, include the RFx Bid Strategy field and the partner question:  RFx Bid Strategy (Direct or Indirect): {!$Input:GPS_Project__c.Direct_or_Indirect__c}

 From Dataset 2, also include this question (with its answer, score, and comments):  “Do you have a confirmed partner that is responding to the RFx/Tender, and does the partner have an existing relationship with the customer (e.g., System Integrator)?”  
2. Other Significant Questions (no tables) - Step 1: Group all records in Dataset 2 (answer bank) by "RFP Pursuit Question Bank". - Step 2: Keep only groups that have answer values of 0 and 10. - Step 3: Further filter to only include questions where RFP_Sales_Role__c = "Account Executive". - Step 4: Use those question IDs to find the related data from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c (Dataset 1). - Step 5: Keep only questions where the answer resolves to 0 points. - Step 6: Exclude the question “Have you zipped and uploaded ALL RFx documents and attachments as part of this RFx intake request?” - Step 7: Render each record as plain text blocks (no table):  Question: {{Question__c}}
 Answer: {{RFP_Answer_Text__c}}
 Score: {{Score__c}}
 Comments: {{Comments2__c}}
 
- Step 8: Add this question (with its answer, score, and comments):  “If the solution requires integration to be compliant, does the customer currently have Mulesoft or another API tool?”  
3. Answer Summary: Provide a concise summary of the GNG scorecard that references key trends or major point losses from the Significant Point Losses section,  and highlights insights from the Other Significant Questions section (including any point losses and whether there is an active customer relationship).  Limit to 4 sentences. 4. Rationale Summary: Summarize the AE, AE MGR, SE MGR, and Security Specialist rationales collectively (do not separate by role). Finally, provide a recommendation on whether to move forward with this opportunity based on all of the data. Do not add any details other than the ones specified above. This section includes questions with a loss of 20 points or more.  
2. Other Significant Questions
- Step 1: Group all records in Dataset 2 (answer bank) by "RFP Pursuit Question Bank".   - Step 2: Keep only groups that have answer values of 0 and 10.   - Step 3: Further filter to only include questions where RFP_Sales_Role__c = "Account Executive".   - Step 4: Use those question IDs to find the related data from GPS_RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c (Dataset 1).   - Step 5: Keep only questions where the answer resolves to 0 points.   - Step 6: Exclude the question “Have you zipped and uploaded ALL RFx documents and attachments as part of this RFx intake request?”   - Step 7: Render each record as plain text blocks (no table): Question: {{Question__c}}

5. Preliminary Assessment for Bid Response
